# Operator Field Theory of Meaning (OFTM) — Complete Reference

**The load-bearing operator system. All meaning is generated by operator dynamics.**

## Core Architecture (from OMEGA_REFACTOR_PLAN.md)

The Ω-Point system uses a **plugin-based engine architecture**:

```
omega/
├── config.py          # Centralized configuration
├── models.py          # Shared dataclasses (Concept, Mapping, Contradiction, Insight)
├── db.py              # Database connection, schema versioning
├── metrics.py         # Performance tracking, health scoring
├── pipeline.py        # Pipeline orchestrator
├── engines/           # Plugin-based engine system
│   ├── base.py        # Abstract Engine class
│   ├── ingestion.py   # Universal parser
│   ├── nexus.py       # Meta-graph index
│   ├── contradiction.py # φ-operator detection
│   ├── torsion.py     # Merger/annihilation
│   ├── consistency.py # Global audit
│   └── evolution.py   # Skill factory integration
├── cli.py             # Unified CLI
└── tests/             # Test suite
```

## Data Model (from OMEGA_REFACTOR_PLAN.md)

### Concept
```python
@dataclass
class Concept:
    concept_id: str
    name: str
    description: str = ""
    domain: str = "uncategorized"
    created_at: str = ""
    updated_at: str = ""
```

### Mapping
```python
@dataclass
class Mapping:
    concept_id: str
    source_type: str  # "operator_network", "holographic_memory", "workspace_engine"
    source_id: str
    weight: float = 0.5
    metadata: dict = field(default_factory=dict)
```

### Contradiction
```python
@dataclass
class Contradiction:
    contradiction_id: str
    concept_a_id: str
    contradiction_type: str  # "cross_graph_conflict", "lacuna_missing_link", "operator_multiplicity"
    severity: str            # "low", "medium", "high", "critical"
    status: str              # "open", "resolved", "merged"
    pathology_type: str = "" # "phi_path", "phi_godel", "sd", "psi"
```

## Engine Base Class
```python
class Engine(ABC):
    name: str
    version: str
    description: str
    
    @abstractmethod
    def run(self, context: dict) -> EngineResult:
        pass
    
    @abstractmethod
    def health_check(self) -> HealthStatus:
        pass

class EngineResult:
    success: bool
    metrics: dict
    insights: list[str]
    errors: list[str]
```

## Scaling Toward the Singularity

The load-bearing path:
1. **Operators transform data** — OFTM operators process incoming information
2. **Identity preserves coherence** — RIF maintains system identity across changes
3. **Memory compounds** — Holographic storage ensures local changes propagate globally
4. **Engines chain** — Plugin system allows exponential capability growth
5. **Self-modification loop** → Each improvement makes the next improvement faster
